currentBounties.name: Agility Circuit
currentBounties.description: Complete 25 laps of an agility course you can access.
currentBounties.help: Bring energy restores; use graceful if you have it.

currentBounties.name: Rat Infestation
currentBounties.description: Exterminate 80 rats in sewers and basements.
currentBounties.help: Use quick-hitting weapons; low food needed.

currentBounties.name: Goblin Menace
currentBounties.help: Use area attacks and bring food.

completedBounties.name: Ankous of the Depths
completedBounties.description: Slay 35 ankous in the stronghold depths.
completedBounties.help: Protect from Melee reduces food use; bring a light source if needed.

completedBounties.name: Chaos Elemental Hunt
completedBounties.description: Track and defeat the Chaos Elemental in the deep wilds.
completedBounties.help: High-risk; bring teleport failsafes and team.

completedBounties.name: Agility Circuit
completedBounties.description: Complete 25 laps of an agility course you can access.
completedBounties.help: Bring energy restores; use graceful if you have it.

completedBounties.name: Hobgoblin Hunt
completedBounties.help: Ranged safespots are common; bring a little food for melee.

completedBounties.name: Pond-to-Plate
completedBounties.description: Catch 80 fish of any type and cook at least 50 of them.
completedBounties.help: Pick a spot near a fire/range to reduce travel.

completedBounties.name: Gargoyle Contract
completedBounties.description: Kill 35 gargoyles and finish each properly.
completedBounties.help: Requires Slayer level; bring a rock hammer and enough prayer/food.

completedBounties.name: TzHaar Warm-Up
completedBounties.description: Defeat 60 TzHaar (any type) in Mor Ul Rek.
completedBounties.help: Bring prayer and a way to handle melee+ranged mixes; do not AFK.

completedBounties.name: Vorkath Cleanup Detail
completedBounties.help: Requires DS2 completion; bring anti-dragon protection, anti-venom, and a crumble undead option.

completedBounties.name: Volcanic Mine Expedition
completedBounties.help: Team content; learn roles (boulder/vents) before attempting efficient runs.

completedBounties.name: Sarachnis Webbreaker
completedBounties.help: Bring crush damage and supplies for adds; practice prayer switching.

completedBounties.name: Blast Furnace Shift
completedBounties.description: Smelt 300 bars at the Blast Furnace (any type).
completedBounties.help: Stamina helps; use ice gloves for some bar types.

completedBounties.name: Herbal Remedies
completedBounties.help: Clean herbs in bulk first; pre-buy secondaries if allowed.

completedBounties.name: Skeleton Legion
completedBounties.help: Use crush or blunt weapons for effectiveness.
